data.title: CANEUS International partners with Maharashtra, India to establish global innovation institute at WEF Davos.
data.description: Announcement from DAVOS, Switzerland on January 23, 2026: The establishment of the world's premier Global Mid-TRL Innovation Acceleration and Skilling Institute focusing on aerospace, space, energy, and deep technology has been revealed. CANEUS International, in collaboration with the Government of Maharashtra (India), unveiled this initiative. The institute is set to be a pioneering force in nurturing innovation with a global reach.

data.title: Binance applies for MiCA license in Greece before July 1 EU deadline, with fast-track process reported post holding company setup there.
data.description: Binance has reportedly accelerated its application for the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) after forming a holding company in Greece last December. The move aims to expedite the approval process for MiCA, reflecting Binance's strategic approach to regulatory compliance.

data.title: Province of Córdoba to offer cash for its U.S. Dollar Step-Up Notes due 2027, announced today, per PRNewswire.
data.description: In Cordoba, Argentina, on January 23, 2026, the Province of Córdoba initiated a cash purchase offer for the outstanding shares. This offer is open to all registered holders or beneficial owners, collectively termed as "Holders." The Province is targeting a specific number of shares for this buyout.

data.title: Trump's lawsuit against JPMorgan and CEO Dimon sends a strong message to Corporate America.
data.description: The legal actions taken by the president against a prominent Wall Street firm and its CEO, Jamie Dimon, have created a sense of unease within Corporate America. The significant impact of these efforts is resonating throughout the business community, raising concerns and causing tremors within the financial sector. The president's actions have underscored the increasing scrutiny and challenges faced by major corporations, highlighting the need for heightened vigilance and compliance within the industry. The legal battles involving the president, the Wall Street giant, and its CEO have captured the attention of many, signaling a potential shift in the relationship between the government and Corporate America. This development has sparked conversations about accountability, regulation, and the responsibilities of key players in the business world.

data.title: Acrivon Therapeutics to present Phase 2b study data on ACR-368 for endometrial cancer at ESGO Congress by Dr. Konstantinopoulos.
data.description: Renowned expert Dr. Panagiotis Konstantinopoulos from Dana-Farber Cancer Institute will present recent interim clinical findings from a Phase 2b study of ACR-368 in patients with endometrial cancer. The study is focused on obtaining registration.

data.title: Advance Auto Parts to release Fourth Quarter & Full Year 2025 earnings, date announced by HQ in Raleigh, NC.
data.description: Advance Auto Parts has revealed the date for their earnings release and conference call for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. This announcement stated that the release and call will be held on a specific date in Raleigh, North Carolina. The call will likely include important financial figures and performance data for the company during that time period. Shareholders and interested parties should mark their calendars for this event to stay informed about the company's progress and future outlook.

data.title: Booz Allen Hamilton reports Q3 EPS of $1.77, sales at $2.62 billion, backlog hits record $38 billion, stock rises.
data.description: Defense contractor Booz Allen Hamilton Holding Corp. (NYSE: BAH) saw a rise in its stock on Friday following the release of its fiscal third-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.77, surpassing the analyst consensus estimate of $1.29. Quarterly sales were reported at $2.62 billion, showing a 10.2% decrease from the previous year and falling short of the street's expectation of $2.75 billion. The backlog increased by 1.5%, hitting a new high at $38 billion, with a quarterly book-to-bill ratio of 0.3x. Revenue excluding billables witnessed a 6.7% decline. For further details, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: HUMAIN and Infra signed an AI and Digital Financing Framework Agreement in Davos, Switzerland.
data.description: In Davos, Switzerland, HUMAIN and Infra have announced a framework agreement for AI and digital financing. This partnership aims to enhance technological advancements and financial support. This collaboration is set to leverage cutting-edge AI technologies and digital financing solutions. The agreement signifies a significant step towards progress in these areas.

data.title: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) announces tax treatment of 2025 distributions on common stock (CUSIP #925652109).
data.description: In New York, VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) revealed the tax treatment for its 2025 distributions on common stock (CUSIP #925652109). Stockholders should consult tax advisors for specifics. Summary of distributions for tax year ending December 31, 2025:- Common stock distribution: $X per share- Qualified dividends: $Y per share- Section 199A dividends: $Z per shareInvestors must note the tax treatment may differ based on individual circumstances.

data.title: Utz Brands to announce Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 12, 2026. Presentation at 6:30am ET. Live Q&A session to follow.
data.description: Hanover, Pennsylvania--Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ), a prominent U.S. producer of branded Salty Snacks, disclosed its intention to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025 on Thursday, February 12, 2026. The announcement will include a press release, pre-recorded management comments, and a slide deck released at 6:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Furthermore, a live webcast for a question and answer session will follow. Utz, categorized as a small-cap growth and value Staples equity, is set to share its performance details with investors.

data.title: Argonaut Private Equity sells VoidForm Products to White Cap, a leading distributor of construction supplies.
data.description: Argonaut Private Equity recently completed the sale of VoidForm Products to White Cap, a reputable distributor of specialty construction supplies and safety products. The transaction marks a significant move in the industry, highlighting the growing trend of acquisitions and partnerships. White Cap, known for its wide-ranging distribution network and quality products, now adds VoidForm Products to its portfolio, expanding its market reach and enhancing its offerings. This strategic acquisition demonstrates the commitment of both companies to furthering their presence in the construction sector.

data.title: SOLOWIN HOLDINGS partners with Quantum and Time Group in Malaysia for green energy promotion. Subsidiary AlloyX enters partnership with QTG.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in Hong Kong, financial technology company Solowin Holdings (NASDAQ: AXG) revealed that its subsidiary, AlloyX (Hong Kong) Limited, has formed a strategic alliance with Quantum and Time Group (QTG), a prominent new energy investment company from Malaysia. This partnership aims to synergize the strengths of both firms in the rapidly growing field of digital assets and traditional finance. The collaboration is expected to bring heightened innovation and investment opportunities to the market, leveraging the combined expertise and resources of the two entities. This move signifies a significant step for both companies in the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: PodcastOne (Nasdaq: PODC) expects record Q3 and Fiscal 2026 results, with revenue guidance raised to $58M - $60M and $5M - $6M Adjusted EBITDA.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in Los Angeles, PodcastOne (Nasdaq: PODC), an influential publisher and podcast sales network, unveiled expected record financial performance for the third fiscal quarter concluding on December 31, 2025 (Q3 Fiscal 2026). They also shared important highlights and revised guidance for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2026 (Fiscal 2026).

data.title: Chunghwa Telecom plans to boost revenue by 2.5-3.2%, expecting NT$241.99~NT$243.68 billion in 2026. Expenses to rise by 3.5-3.7%.
data.description: Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd. announced its 2026 guidance, emphasizing its new vision "Igniting the Future with AI." The company plans to deepen its strategic focus on "Digital Resilience, Smart Empowerment, Sustainable Future" and deploy AI across its operations. By prioritizing technology advancements and expanding business areas, they aim to achieve revenue growth. They also plan to enhance ESG initiatives, focusing on environmental, social, and governance aspects. In 2026, the company expects total revenue to increase by NT$5.88-NT$7.57 billion, operating costs to rise by NT$6.54-NT$7.01 billion, and income from operations to range from a decrease of NT$0.41 to an increase of NT$1.11 billion. Net income and earnings per share are projected to be NT$37.39-NT$38.94 billion and NT$4.82-NT$5.02, respectively. The Company aims to drive revenue growth through mobile communications, broadband access, data communications, and emerging businesses, backed by AI and sustainability opportunities.
